enumeration_literals.name: admit_duplicates
enumeration_literals.description: two entries in the Zip archive may have the same full name

enumeration_literals.name: error_on_duplicate
enumeration_literals.description: raise exception on attempt to add twice the same entry name

simple_types.name: PKZip_method
simple_types.code:
type PKZip_method is
  (store,
   shrink,
   reduce_1,
   reduce_2,
   reduce_3,
   reduce_4,
   implode,
   tokenize,
   …,
   unknown);

array_types.name: Byte_Buffer
array_types.code: type Byte_Buffer is array (Integer range <>) of aliased Byte;

tagged_types.name: Zip_Info
tagged_types.code:
type Zip_Info is
  new Ada.Finalization.Controlled with private;

subtypes.name: Reduce_Format
subtypes.code: subtype Reduce_Format is PKZip_method range reduce_1 .. reduce_4;

parameters.name: file
parameters.description:
^ = buffer'Length if no end of file occurred
    before last buffer element.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description:

    before last buffer element.

parameters.name: actually_read
parameters.description:
^ = buffer'Length if no end of file occurred
    before last buffer element.

subprograms.name: Block_Read
Block_Read

documentation.description:
Same, but instead of giving actually_read, raises End_Error if
the buffer cannot be fully read.
This mimics the 'Read stream attribute; can be a lot faster, depending
on the compiler's run-time library.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.description:
^ = buffer'Length if no end of stream occurred
    before last buffer element.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description:
^ = buffer'Length if no end of stream occurred
    before last buffer element.

parameters.name: actually_read
parameters.description:
^ = buffer'Length if no end of stream occurred
    before last buffer element.
